EdTech Marketing

Turning communities into growth engines.

Elevating the voices of users, educators, students, and partners creates authenticity and relevance. Peer-driven storytelling strengthens credibility and drives long-term growth because people trust those who share their experiences.

Book a strategy session
The practice

We do not just observe the EdTech market, we help shape it.

Through The EdTech Mentor, our in-house customer marketing initiative, we engage more than 6,500 subscribers and over 80 practitioners across our Essentials, Founders, and Investor series. This active community, combined with our research capabilities, keeps us close to emerging trends, audience behaviors, and product innovations — fueling every strategy with actionable insight.

Case study production Customer Spotlights video series Thought leadership programs Community-driven content The EdTech Mentor initiative Interview series — Essentials, Founders, Investor
Clients

Brands we've turned into growth engines.

Busuu

Language learning platform. We produced a series of filmed customer spotlights with world-renowned brands across Europe, turning Busuu's best customers into its most effective advocates.

D2L (Brightspace)

A consistent #3 in LMS market share. We support D2L's content marketing across Latin America as the company invests in its "Lumi" AI suite — adaptive course delivery and personalized learning pathways.

Anthology

One of our most prominent relationships. Work has included celebrating leadership in higher education and amplifying Anthology's presence in Latin America through the "Antología" initiative.

Instructure (Canvas)

The fastest-growing LMS in US higher education. We apply deep sector knowledge of both the higher-ed and K–12 buyer landscape to support Instructure's marketing in a highly competitive market.

What this looks like

From a single conversation to a content engine.

The EdTech Mentor

Our owned thought-leadership publication, and the clearest expression of this practice. Long-form interviews with EdTech founders, investors, and operators, produced end-to-end: questionnaire, recording, full video, article, illustration, teaser clip, and newsletter distribution.

Customer Spotlights

Filmed customer success stories that move beyond the traditional case study — interview planning, filming, editing, and a full content suite generated from a single round of interviewing: video, photos, blog articles, social posts, and ad creative.

Community-Driven Content

Editorial strategy documents that define a thought-leadership program's purpose, target audience, guest criteria, and thematic pillars before a single piece of content gets produced — establishing the "why" before the "what."

Services in this practice

Where to start.

Thought Leadership & Executive Content

Video, Motion & Editorial Content

Turn your customers into your growth engine.
